headline: T-Mobile Expands 5G Into Education And Security While Valuation Lags Targets
summary: T-Mobile US (NasdaqGS:TMUS) announced a new partnership with McGraw Hill to provide 5G enabled devices and digital learning tools aimed at improving K 12 connectivity between school and home. The company also entered into a collaboration with Infobip to use T-Mobile network APIs for enterprise security, user verification, and fraud prevention. These agreements extend T-Mobile activity beyond core mobile service into education technology and enterprise security solutions. T-Mobile US...

headline: Ahead Of Its Mega-IPO, SpaceX Reminds Investors Disruption Is Coming
summary: The SpaceX initial public offering promises to be the capital markets event of the century, breaking records and creating a new trillion-dollar company for investors to add to their portfolios.  Elon Musk’s commercial space company has leveraged its low-cost reusable rockets to disrupt space launch, communications, and, eventually, AI computing.  SpaceX is among the bidders, along with  T-Mobile US Verizon AT&T  and others.

content.title: Ahead Of Its Mega-IPO, SpaceX Reminds Investors Disruption Is Coming

headline: How The T-Mobile US (TMUS) Narrative Is Evolving As Growth Meets Valuation Caution
summary: The consensus analyst fair value for T-Mobile US edges to US$268.68 from US$268.52, a small US$0.16 move that still matters if you are tracking how expectations evolve over time. That shift reflects a mix of optimism from bullish analysts lifting or reaffirming targets such as US$240 and US$270.50, and caution from others trimming targets or holding neutral views after reassessing sector conditions. Read on to see what is driving these differing calls and how you can keep track of the story...
